message:
fix: four correctness improvements across scope, task_table, udp, and choreography

scope.rs — race_all empty-handles guard:
  Add early return with a descriptive CancelReason when race_all is
  called with an empty handles vec, preventing downstream panics in
  SelectAll. Includes test: race_all_empty_fails_fast. Also tightens
  RwLock guard scope in hedge test to avoid holding the lock across
  assertions.

task_table.rs — canonicalize record.id on insert:
  insert() now uses insert_with() to set record.id to the actual arena
  slot, keeping table invariants intact even when callers pass a
  placeholder TaskId. remove() now derives the cleanup key from the
  arena index rather than record.id, ensuring stored_futures cleanup
  works even with stale record ids. insert_task() now delegates to
  insert() for consistent behavior. Includes test:
  remove_by_index_cleans_stored_future_even_with_stale_record_id.

udp.rs — from_std returns Result:
  Replace the From<StdUdpSocket> trait impl with an explicit from_std()
  constructor that returns io::Result, allowing callers to handle the
  set_nonblocking failure instead of silently ignoring it with let _.
  Updated tests accordingly.

obligation/choreography/pipeline.rs — compensation-only participants:
  Fix interaction_to_steps so participants that appear only in the
  compensation branch of a Compensate interaction are still represented
  in the saga plan. Previously they were dropped because compensation
  steps were only collected when the participant had forward steps.
  Reserve/Abort boundary markers are now only added when the
  participant has both forward and compensation work. Includes test:
  compensate_keeps_compensation_only_participants_without_spurious_boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
